name: Oraimo Bullet 36W Fast Car Charger
description: Ultra-compact metal car charger with dual USB ports featuring AniFast technology for smart, lightning-fast device charging.
warning: Ensure the charger is firmly pushed into the cigarette lighter socket for uninterrupted power distribution.

name: Anker PowerDrive PD+ 2 35W Car Charger
description: High-end car charger equipped with a 20W Power Delivery USB-C port and a 15W PowerIQ USB-A port to charge two devices simultaneously at high speed.

specs.compatibility: Optimized for iPhone 12-15 Series, iPad Pro, and Premium Androids

warning: Use an authentic USB-C to Lightning or USB-C to USB-C cable to unlock maximum Power Delivery speeds.

name: Baseus Grain Pro Dual USB 4.8A Car Charger
description: An incredibly small mini car charger that sits completely flush with your dashboard cigarette lighter port, offering discrete yet powerful dual USB charging.

specs.compatibility: Universal compatibility for smartphones, dashcams, and GPS units

warning: Do not extract the charger forcefully; pull gently using the perimeter grooved grips.

name: LDNIO DL-C29 Dual USB Car Charger with Cable
description: A highly popular budget-friendly package in Nairobi containing a durable dual-port USB car adapter alongside a complimentary heavy-duty data cable.

specs.compatibility: All Android Micro-USB/Type-C and iPhone entry options

warning: Check your selected package option to ensure the bundled cable matches your specific device port type.

name: Baseus T-Space Bluetooth FM Transmitter & Car Charger
description: The ultimate upgrade for older car stereos. Streams clear music and hands-free calls from your phone via Bluetooth to your car radio frequency while fast-charging two devices.
features: Dual USB Charging Ports + USB Flash Drive Reader

specs.compatibility: Universal Bluetooth devices and all vehicles with FM radios

warning: Tune your car radio to a completely empty FM frequency local station to avoid background static noise overlap.

name: Awei C-831 2.1A Dual Car Charger
description: Affordable and highly resilient standard dual USB car adapter. Reliable power solution for daily matatu or personal commute tracking.

specs.compatibility: Universal standard charging across all mobile platforms

warning: This unit provides standard baseline speeds; it does not trigger Qualcomm QuickCharge indicators.

name: Samsung 45W Dual Fast Car Charger (PD + QC)
description: Blazing fast original-spec dual car adapter combining a massive 45W USB-C Power Delivery port with a 15W USB-A port to effortlessly activate Samsung Super Fast Charging 2.0.

specs.compatibility: Samsung S22/S23/S24 Ultra Series, Note series, and PD-enabled laptops

warning: A 5A E-Marker USB-C to USB-C cable is strictly required to achieve full 45W power output.

name: Celebrat CC-08 Dual USB 2.4A Car Charger
description: A straightforward, reliable dual-port car charger featuring smart IC technology that dynamically splits power across two connected devices safely.

specs.compatibility: Universal capability for all basic smartphones and mobile accessories

warning: Avoid leaving the charger exposed to direct high-noon dashboard heat for extended durations when parked.

name: Baseus Golden Contactor Pro 40W Dual Quick Charger
description: Stunning premium metal car adapter featuring dual fast-charging ports (USB-C + USB-A) finished with elegant semi-transparent circular ambient LED ring routing.
features: Ice Blue Circular Ambient Ring Lighting

specs.compatibility: Supports Apple PD, Xiaomi QC, Huawei FCP, and Samsung AFC

warning: The circular LED indicator remains lit while plugged in if your vehicle socket provides continuous battery hot-power when off.

name: Oraimo Highway 2 10.5W Dual Car Charger
description: The perfect durable daily workhorse accessory. Delivers stable 10.5W dual charging performance packed into a highly durable scratchproof outer composite shell.

specs.compatibility: Extensive model fitments across entry and mid-tier Androids and iPhones

warning: Disconnect your device before starting heavy commercial trucks to shield from initial starter voltage fluctuations.
